title: Fixed Recharts Blank Canvas on Zoom
why: When maximizing charts, Recharts ResponsiveContainer rendered an empty canvas due to duplicate DOM ID collisions and ResizeObserver animation desyncs.
root_cause: When maximizing charts, Recharts ResponsiveContainer rendered an empty canvas due to duplicate DOM ID collisions and ResizeObserver animation desyncs.
solution: Unmounted the background chart instance when the ChartZoom modal is open, forcing a fresh mount inside the modal.
